FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Risk-On Sentiment and Record Equities Support Bullish Bias
tldr_points: Risk-on environment drives JPY weakness as equities reach record highs
USD weakness moderates amid positive risk sentiment
Technical setup favors buying on dips toward key moving averages
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY positioned for upside as risk-on sentiment undermines JPY safe-haven demand.
FX.comment: Risk-on environment and record equities support JPY weakness; buy on MA20 dips

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Big Tech Earnings Wave and No U.S.-Iran Talks Drive Bullish Bias
tldr_points: Mega-cap tech earnings (Apple, Amazon, Google) provide near-term fundamental support for S&P 500
Absence of scheduled U.S.-Iran talks eliminates immediate geopolitical risk premium
VGIT vs IEI maturity gap favors equity allocation over intermediate-duration fixed income
STOCKS.excerpt: Bullish S&P 500 tactical view driven by big tech earnings and no U.S.-Iran talks, offsetting unknown technicals.
STOCKS.comment: Big tech earnings and absent geopolitical risk drive bullish bias despite unknown technical metrics

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] FLAT: Regulatory Headwinds Offset Institutional Tailwinds
tldr_points: Mixed regulatory landscape with Brazil ban and US sanctions creating short-term friction
JPMorgan tokenization thesis validates long-term institutional demand
Technical setup lacks clear momentum signal pending price discovery
CRYPTO.excerpt: Regulatory noise from Brazil and US sanctions tempers bullish tokenization narrative; tactical patience warranted
CRYPTO.comment: Awaiting technical breakout or fundamental catalyst to establish directional bias; range-bound discipline preferred
